core_datasets.title: 311 Service Requests
core_datasets.description: All 311 service requests from all channels. Transitioning to new backend (Oct 2025 - mid 2026).

core_datasets.title: Trash Schedules by Address
core_datasets.description: Current trash and recycling schedules for each address.

core_datasets.title: Trash Collection Days
core_datasets.description: PWD trash collection days by district.

core_datasets.title: Approved Building Permits
core_datasets.description: Building permits establishing compliance with State Building Code.

core_datasets.title: Public Works Violations
core_datasets.description: Citations issued by PWD Code Enforcement Division.

core_datasets.title: Active Food Establishment Licenses
core_datasets.description: Currently licensed food establishments in Boston.

core_datasets.title: Parking Meters
core_datasets.description: City of Boston parking meter locations.

core_datasets.title: Streetlight Locations
core_datasets.description: PWD Street Lighting Division maintains 40,000 of 67,000 streetlights.

core_datasets.title: BPRD Trees
core_datasets.description: City tree inventory managed by Parks and Recreation.

core_datasets.title: RentSmart
core_datasets.description: Compiles 311 and ISD data for prospective tenants evaluating rental properties.

core_datasets.title: Mayors 24 Hour Hotline
core_datasets.description: Legacy dataset from before the 311 platform launched in 2015.
